visual_description: A man with dark hair and a mustache sits in the driver's seat of a car, wearing a black jacket. He places his right hand on his forehead, then moves it to his hair while his eyes are closed. He opens his eyes, looks forward, glances to his right, and returns his gaze forward.
audio_description: The audio is quiet with faint ambient noise. There is no clear speech or distinct sound.
